reason: Verify AppMotion's shape (class, static const fields, inline docs) matches the AppDimens convention; no widget styles regressed.
Verify no new dependencies, no use of disallowed patterns; flutter build web green; existing widget tests unchanged.
Verify the AnimatedSwitcher direction tracking on repo_shell respects the existing notifier/provider pattern; no leaked AnimationControllers.
Verify the per-tile TweenAnimationBuilder<double> is properly typed; no dynamic/Object slips in the new motion code.
Verify no parallel Duration/Curve constants were introduced; AppMotion is the single source for the touched files.
Animation work crosses theme → views; verify the AppMotion import is consistent and no UI surface still reaches for raw literals where AppMotion would do.
